testcase.name: test_reset_flags_owner
testcase.failure: tests/test_new_features.py:126: in test_reset_flags_owner assert r2.json()["flags"]["ENABLE_VISION_LLM_FOR_PDF_IMAGES"] is False E assert True is False

testcase.name: test_flag_default_false

failure.message: AssertionError: assert True is False + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa693c5eb000>('ENABLE_VISION_LLM_FOR_PDF_IMAGES') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa693c5eb000> = {'ENABLE_ADVANCED_OCR': True, 'ENABLE_ANALYTICS_DASHBOARD': True, 'ENABLE_AUDIT_LOG': True, 'ENABLE_BACKGROUND_INGESTION': True, ...}.get + where {'ENABLE_ADVANCED_OCR': True, 'ENABLE_ANALYTICS_DASHBOARD': True, 'ENABLE_AUDIT_LOG': True, 'ENABLE_BACKGROUND_INGESTION': True, ...} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: tests/test_new_features.py:226: in test_flag_default_false assert r.json().get("ENABLE_VISION_LLM_FOR_PDF_IMAGES") is False E AssertionError: assert True is False E + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa693c5eb000>('ENABLE_VISION_LLM_FOR_PDF_IMAGES') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa693c5eb000> = {'ENABLE_ADVANCED_OCR': True, 'ENABLE_ANALYTICS_DASHBOARD': True, 'ENABLE_AUDIT_LOG': True, 'ENABLE_BACKGROUND_INGESTION': True, ...}.get E + where {'ENABLE_ADVANCED_OCR': True, 'ENABLE_ANALYTICS_DASHBOARD': True, 'ENABLE_AUDIT_LOG': True, 'ENABLE_BACKGROUND_INGESTION': True, ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
